# velia_server_group (Resource)

Creates a server group in Velia.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "velia_server_group" "example" {
  name    = "web-servers"
  color   = "#13355b"
  servers = [12345, 12346]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `color` (String) Server group color (HTML5 hex color, e.g. #13355b).
- `name` (String) Server group name.
- `servers` (List of Number) List of server IDs to include in the group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Server group ID returned by Velia.
